title: Network Flow, Cuts, and Bipartite Matching · Invariant Triage
summary: Assign workers to constrained jobs and identify capacity bottlenecks. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a flow-based assignment model and cut explanation and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate capacities, conservation, source, sink, and residual choices from a stakeholder problem.
Trace forward and reverse residual capacity after augmentation.
Find augmenting paths and update flow without violating capacity or conservation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
